articles.description: The 2026-27 budget shows minimal change in allocations after the tri-corporation area was renamed as Core Urban Region, with most GHMC figures retained, major funds going to infrastructure projects, and reduced allocations for disaster response, MMTS and heritage authority works.

articles.title: A.P. CM orders officials to submit crop loss report within two days
articles.description: Naidu assesses the impact of heavy wind, untimely rains, and hailstorms in the State; estimated total crop damage across categories has been pegged at ₹63 crore so far

topStories.title: ‘Cowards’: Donald Trump hits out at ‘paper tiger’ NATO over lack of support for Iran war
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump criticized NATO allies for their insufficient backing in the war against Iran, claiming that NATO is ineffective without American support.

topStories.title: ‘Unconscious, leaned onto cord’: What is the ‘Blackout’ social media challenge that claimed one life in Texas?
topStories.description: In 2022, a UK-based media report mentioned that at least 20 deaths had been linked to the blackout challenge within 18 months, with 15 of the victims being 12 or younger. Here's all you need to know about the trend which cost a nine-year-old from Texas her life

topStories.title: ‘Had you been neutral…’: Owaisi slams PM Modi, Pakistan over ‘siding with Israel’ in Iran war
topStories.description: “Modi deposited himself in the corner of Trump and Netanyahu. Had you been neutral, perhaps there would have been weight in your words,” AIMIM chief said.

dailyNews.title: Nebraska ends decades of March Madness heartbreak with first-ever NCAA Tournament win
dailyNews.description: The Nebraska Cornhuskers can finally call themselves winners in March Madness, notching their first-ever victory in the NCAA Tournament on Thursday against No. 13 Troy.

dailyNews.title: Most Americans expect Trump to send boots on the ground in Iran — but majority oppose it: Poll
dailyNews.description: A Reuters/Ipsos poll finds 55% of Americans oppose sending U.S. ground troops into the conflict with Iran, as nearly two-thirds fear Trump will do so.

dailyNews.title: Nearly 36 million March Madness brackets busted on day one as upsets wreak havoc
dailyNews.description: Nearly 36 million March Madness brackets were busted after Day 1 upsets, leaving just 14,000 perfect brackets — only 0.039% of all entries still flawless.

dailyNews.title: Actor and martial artist Chuck Norris dead at 86
dailyNews.description: Chuck Norris, iconic actor and martial artist, has died, his family announced in a statement, saying he passed surrounded by loved ones and at peace.

dailyNews.title: Tourists in Las Vegas pay $1,000 for dinner on the Strip while sharks eat like royalty
dailyNews.description: Mandalay Bay's lead aquarist says the resort's sharks eat better than tourists on the Strip, dining on mackerel, herring and sardines three times a week.

dailyNews.title: Slain Loyola Chicago student's family fumes over 'murder,' manhunt for masked gunman in attack near campus
dailyNews.description: The family of Loyola University Chicago student Sheridan Gorman demands answers after she was shot and killed near campus in a seemingly random attack.

dailyNews.title: Ex-FBI agents involved in Arctic Frost probe sue for wrongful termination
dailyNews.description: Two ex-FBI agents sued the bureau to challenge their firing, which they argued was an act of politically motivated retaliation tied 'solely' to their work on the Arctic Frost probe.

dailyNews.title: Snow drought grips ski industry as resorts turn to Gen Z skiers, new activities to fill lifts

dailyNews.description: AI industry leaders have opposed state-level regulatory efforts, arguing that a "patchwork" of laws would hobble innovation and give China a competitive edge.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin tasks Treasury Dept. with student loan collection. What borrowers need to know
dailyNews.description: Trump officials plan to task the Treasury Department with collecting on defaulted student loans and eventually "operational support" on current loans.

dailyNews.description: During the meeting, Trump praised Japan for "stepping up" to assist in efforts to secure the Strait of Hormuz, "unlike NATO."

dailyNews.description: Netanyahu's comments came after President Donald Trump, speaking in the Oval Office, said earlier that he would not send U.S. troops to the Middle East.

dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
